title: hieracium pellitum subsp. prasinellum
intro: Hieracium pellitum subsp. prasinellum, also known as Hieracium prasinellum, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and reduce the risk of various diseases.
